endpoints.name: Get collection by id
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get collection icons by id
endpoints.description: Returns a list of icons associated with a collection
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get collection by slug
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SLUG}} with a real slug.

endpoints.name: Get collection icons by slug
endpoints.description: Returns a list of icons associated with a collection
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SLUG}} with a real slug.

endpoints.name: Get all collections
endpoints.description: Return's a list of all collections

endpoints.name: Get icon by id
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Get icon by term
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TERM}} with a real term.

endpoints.name: Get recent icons
endpoints.description: Returns list of most recently uploaded icons

endpoints.name: Get icons by term
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TERM}} with a real term.

endpoints.name: Get api quota status
endpoints.description: Returns current oauth usage and limits

endpoints.name: Get user collections
endpoints.description: Returns a list of collections associated with a user
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USER_ID}} with a real user_id.

endpoints.name: Get user collection
endpoints.description: Returns a single collection associated with a user
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SLUG}} with a real slug. Replace {{USER_ID}} with a real user_id.

endpoints.name: Get user uploads with user
endpoints.description: Returns a list of uploads associated with a user
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.
